name: Stuck Between Heaven and Hell
description:
Normally bitter enemies, Panty & Stocking must reluctantly work with Scanty & Kneesocks to recollect enough Heaven Coins and Hell Coins to reopen the portals to their realms.

You're tagged along in helping this dysfunctional team complete their mission, despite their constant infighting and distractions. Between supernatural battles and collecting coins, you'll need to mediate between heavenly hedonism and hellish discipline while surviving their explosive personalities.
creator: JQRyu
